text.title: Agent Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure for producing the agent-patterns decision record. Each step has typed input, action, and typed output.

step.name: classify-task-shape
step.input: Task brief (≤500 chars); tool inventory JSON.
step.action: Categorise the task into one of: research/investigation, code-fix, multi-step build, structured-extraction, irreversible-action. Use the haiku-tier classifier with a fixed prompt.
step.output: {task_class: enum, has_success_signal: bool, subtasks_enumerable: bool, action_reversibility: enum[reversible|partial|irreversible]}

step.name: apply-decision-tree
step.action: Walk content/06-decision-tree.xml. Branches on has_success_signal first (deterministic check available?), then subtasks_enumerable, then action_reversibility.
step.decision-gate: If chosen_pattern == escalate-to-human, stop and return the record with status="escalated".

step.name: set-caps-and-models
step.action: Pick max_iterations (ReAct), max_steps (Plan-and-Execute), or max_attempts (Reflexion). Default = 10, 8, 3 respectively. Pick actor_model (sonnet for general, haiku for cheap classification, opus for high-stakes). For Reflexion, pick critic_model one tier below actor.

step.name: wire-terminal-signal-and-gate
step.action: Identify the terminal_condition: a test command, schema validator, or rule check. Compute human_gate_required by scanning the tool inventory for write/send/post/delete verbs.
step.decision-gate: If chosen_pattern == reflexion AND terminal_condition is not deterministic, downgrade to ReAct + human review.

step.name: emit-decision-record
step.action: Compose the decision record per content/02-output-contract.xml schema. Include rejected_patterns with reasons. Run scripts/validate-agent-patterns.py.
step.output: Validated JSON decision record at the path supplied by the caller.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, fix and re-emit; never publish an invalid record.
